caption: The scene takes place in a room with wooden paneled walls, where a small group of people is gathered for a presentation. At the front of the room, two men stand behind a podium; one man on the left wears a blue shirt, and the man on the right wears a dark vest over a white shirt. An audience sits in the foreground with their backs to the camera, including individuals wearing a maroon jacket, a navy blue sweater, and a yellow shirt. A logo with the text "ORCA" is visible in the lower right of the frame. Throughout the sequence, the people remain in their positions with minimal movement, suggesting a steady shot of a lecture or meeting. The lighting is consistent across the scene, and no significant changes in action or environment occur between the frames.
